title: The Distance of 'Travel' (and A Case Study in The Development of Fiqh)?
stanceSummary: In this answer, Yasir Qadhi addresses "The Distance of 'Travel' (and A Case Study in The Development of Fiqh)" and outlines the ruling with its main conditions and limits. He emphasizes following foundational Quranic and Sunnah principles while accounting for context, scholarly nuance, and practical realities for Muslims today.
